pages.insight: Although user stickiness improved (6.8% → 10.8%), the decline in Monthly Active Users indicates a shrinking overall user base, while a 54.9% drop-off before gameplay highlights the need to improve onboarding and retention.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.insight: Game performance experienced a significant downturn, with the average daily score dropping from 87,248 in January to 28,986 in February. This represents a 66.8% decrease, indicating a sharp decline in player activity and engagement levels.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.insight: Player engagement time has declined significantly, with the average daily session dropping from 87 minute in January to 32 minute in February a 63.1% decrease. This reduction in playtime correlates with lower scores, indicating a critical loss of user interest.
